summary: Tested RT 037 RW 002 Desa X profile site. All 17 backend pytest tests pass (profil, pengurus, statistik, berita filter+limit+detail+404, galeri, pengaduan create/list/validation). Frontend home loads with hero, navbar scrolls work for all 6 sections, berita category filters work correctly, kontak form submit succeeds and clears + success toast shows. Found 1 critical UI bug: VISI card renders white text on white background (invisible content).

ui_bugs.issue: VISI card text is invisible. The Tailwind utility `bg-[#2D4A3E]` is overridden by `.heritage-card { background: var(--bg-surface) }` in /app/frontend/src/App.css (line 7-12), so the dark-green background never applies. With `text-white` still applied, visi quote renders white-on-white. Computed: bg=rgb(255,255,255), color=rgb(255,255,255). Text exists in DOM correctly.

Submitting a completely empty form does NOT show the JS toast.error('Mohon lengkapi nama, subjek, dan pesan'). Reason: <Input> and <Textarea> have HTML5 `required` attribute, so the browser blocks submission natively and onSubmit handler never runs. Native browser tooltip appears instead. Functional behavior is fine, but spec says 'submitting empty form shows error toast' — toast won't show unless `required` is removed or `noValidate` is added to the form.

action_items: Fix VISI card invisible text: either remove `heritage-card` class from the visi-card div, change `.heritage-card { background: var(--bg-surface) }` to use a Tailwind-compatible approach (e.g. apply via @layer components with lower priority), or add an inline style/override for the visi variant (e.g. `bg-[#2D4A3E]` with `!` modifier: `!bg-[#2D4A3E]`). Same risk for any other heritage-card that intends a non-white bg.
(Optional) For Kontak form: if the spec requires a toast for empty submit, add `noValidate` to the <form> or remove `required` from inputs so the JS-level toast.error path is reachable.
critical_code_review_comments: Tailwind utility classes losing to plain CSS in App.css due to equal specificity + source order — affects `.heritage-card` overrides. Consider using @layer components in index.css or `!` important modifier where intentional.
server.py has a stale 'renamed' key in one SEED_BERITA entry that is stripped later; harmless but indicates leftover code. Pydantic model uses extra='ignore' so it's safe.
Berita seed `tanggal` is YYYY-MM-DD (string sort works for chronological order — OK), but sort('tanggal', -1) on string is fine here.
Server uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan handlers in newer FastAPI.
Profil endpoint returns hardcoded data (not from DB) — acceptable for MVP but worth a comment.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 pengurus, 1 statistik, 4 berita, 4 galeri on startup. Test created 1 TEST_-prefixed pengaduan (not deleted; no DELETE endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully working. Focus next iteration on (1) verifying VISI card visible after CSS fix — check `getComputedStyle(visi-card).backgroundColor` ≠ rgb(255,255,255), and (2) if main agent changes empty-form validation, re-run the empty-submit toast detection. Backend regression suite is /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — re-runnable with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v
rca_of_the_issue: VISI invisible text RCA: In /app/frontend/src/components/Profil.jsx line 29, the Visi card uses className 'heritage-card p-8 lg:p-12 bg-[#2D4A3E] text-white'. In /app/frontend/src/App.css line 7-12, `.heritage-card { background: var(--bg-surface); }` defines background using a plain CSS property. Tailwind arbitrary utility `bg-[#2D4A3E]` compiles to a class with equal specificity (single class). Because App.css is imported AFTER tailwind utility output in build order (or the heritage-card declaration's `background` shorthand wins over `background-color` from Tailwind), the white background applies. Combined with `text-white`, the quoted visi text becomes invisible. Mitigation: use `!bg-[#2D4A3E]` (Tailwind important modifier) OR don't apply `heritage-card` to inverted-color variants OR redefine heritage-card inside @layer components so utility classes always win.
